summary: Kekoon and TowF engage in a intense battle, each using their skills to push the other to their limits. As they fight, they seem to enjoy the challenge and competition, and Kekoon is able to tap into his happy memories of time spent with someone named Ottoi. The battle reaches its climax as they both unleash their final blows, leading to a dramatic conclusion.
key_moments: Kekoon and TowF begin their intense battle
Kekoon taps into his happy memories of Ottoi while fighting
The two opponents reach the end of their limits and exchange final blows
